data.text:
Create a luxurious look for your dream
kitchen, with a superb selection of
classic cabinetry, quality Blanco appliances, designer tapware and premium finishes.
CUPBOARDS
Square edge door and drawer fronts with PVC edging and selected door handles from Builders Range all with soft close options as standard.
Overhead cupboards and microwave provision.
Laminated Pantry unit (plan specific) (2100mm high) with four 5 Melamine shelves
Painted MDF bulkheads to ceiling).
600mm wide cupboards with White melamine internal linings including one (1) intermediate shelf and a bank of four (4) drawers.
Plan specific: Laminated pantry unit (2100mm high) with White melamine shelves OR Walk-In
Pantry with 5 White melamine shelves.
Laminate colours in Polytec or Laminex Smooth, Sheen, Matt, and Woodmatt finishes.
SPLASH BACK
Up to 710mm above all benchtops from standard Builders Range.
Ceramic tiles from Builders Range.
Fixed Glass Window Splash back plan specific.
FRIDGE
Water connection to fridge space standard.
Two door laminated ‘push to open’ overhead cupboards above fridge.
